detail.bookNowSave: Book now and save {discount}% — limited spots available.
detail.freeCancellation24h: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before
detail.faqIncluded: What is included in the {tourTitle} tour?
detail.faqIncludedAnswer: The {tourTitle} tour includes: {includes}. The tour duration is {duration}.
detail.faqPickupYes: Is hotel pickup included for the {tourTitle} tour?
detail.faqPickupYesAnswer: Yes! Free hotel pickup and drop-off is included from major hotels in {location}. Our driver will collect you directly from your hotel lobby.
detail.faqPickupNo: How do I get to the {tourTitle} starting point?
detail.faqPickupNoAnswer: Hotel pickup is not included for this tour. You will need to make your own way to the meeting point in {location}. We will send you the exact location and directions after booking.
detail.faqPricing: How much does the {tourTitle} cost and what is the cancellation policy?
detail.faqPricingAnswer: The {tourTitle} is priced at {price} {currency} per person (originally {originalPrice} {currency}). Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the tour with a full refund, no questions asked.
detail.faqSwimmingAnswer: Life jackets are provided for all guests and wearing them is encouraged. Snorkeling is optional on most stops. However, if the tour includes diving, basic swimming ability is recommended. Our guides are trained in water safety.
detail.faqBeginnersAnswer: Yes! The {tourTitle} is designed to be accessible to all experience levels, including complete beginners. Professional instructors and guides will be with you throughout the experience.
detail.faqBring: What should I bring on the {tourTitle}?
detail.faqBringAnswer: We recommend comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen, insect repellent, a hat, and a waterproof bag for your belongings. Drinking water and refreshments are provided.
detail.faqChildrenAnswer: Most of our tours are suitable for children aged 4 and above. Life jackets are available in all sizes. Children under 4 are typically free, and ages 4-11 receive a 50% discount. Contact us for specific age restrictions.

phi-phi-speedboat.title: Phi Phi Islands
phi-phi-speedboat.subtitle: Speedboat Day Trip
phi-phi-speedboat.description: Visit Maya Bay, Pileh Lagoon, Viking Cave, and snorkel in crystal-clear waters. Small group tour with max 20 guests for an intimate experience.

james-bond-island.title: James Bond Island
james-bond-island.subtitle: Phang Nga Bay by Speedboat
james-bond-island.description: Explore the iconic James Bond Island, kayak through sea caves, visit floating villages, and discover hidden lagoons in Phang Nga Bay.

similan-islands.title: Similan Islands
similan-islands.subtitle: Snorkeling Paradise
similan-islands.description: Travel to Thailand's #1 snorkeling destination. Crystal waters, white sand beaches, and vibrant coral reefs. Open October to May only.

phi-phi-sunrise.title: Phi Phi Sunrise Tour
phi-phi-sunrise.subtitle: Beat the Crowds
phi-phi-sunrise.description: Experience Phi Phi before the crowds arrive. Depart at 5:30 AM, reach Maya Bay by sunrise. Maximum 18 guests for an exclusive experience.

racha-island.title: Racha Island
racha-island.subtitle: Coral Reef Paradise
racha-island.description: Just 30 minutes from Phuket, Racha offers pristine white sand and the clearest water in the region. Perfect for snorkeling and diving.

koh-yao-escape.title: Koh Yao Island Escape
koh-yao-escape.subtitle: Untouched Paradise
koh-yao-escape.description: Escape the crowds on Koh Yao Noi, just 15 minutes from Phuket. Pristine beaches, local fishing villages, and the most peaceful island in the area.

4-islands-krabi.title: 4 Islands Krabi
4-islands-krabi.subtitle: Emerald Sea Adventure
4-islands-krabi.description: Discover Krabi's stunning 4 islands: Tup Island, Chicken Island, Poda Island, and Phra Nang Cave Beach. Swim in the emerald Andaman Sea.

hong-islands-krabi.title: Hong Islands
hong-islands-krabi.subtitle: Hidden Lagoon Discovery
hong-islands-krabi.description: Explore secret lagoons surrounded by towering limestone cliffs. Fewer crowds than Phi Phi with pristine beaches and incredible snorkeling.

railay-rock-climbing.title: Railay Rock Climbing
railay-rock-climbing.subtitle: World-Class Limestone Cliffs
railay-rock-climbing.description: Climb the world-famous limestone cliffs at Railay Beach with professional instructors. Suitable for complete beginners to advanced climbers.

emerald-pool-hot-springs.title: Emerald Pool & Hot Springs
emerald-pool-hot-springs.subtitle: Jungle Spa Day
emerald-pool-hot-springs.description: Swim in the famous crystal-clear Emerald Pool, soak in natural hot springs, and climb 1,237 steps to the Tiger Cave Temple summit viewpoint.

krabi-sunset-dinner.title: Krabi Sunset Dinner Cruise
krabi-sunset-dinner.subtitle: 4 Islands at Golden Hour
krabi-sunset-dinner.description: Sail to Koh Poda, Chicken Island, Tup Island and Railay at sunset. BBQ dinner on board, then swim alongside bioluminescent plankton.

krabi-mangrove-kayak.title: Mangrove Kayaking
krabi-mangrove-kayak.subtitle: Ancient Forest Adventure
krabi-mangrove-kayak.description: Paddle through ancient mangrove forests, explore hidden caves and lagoons. Spot monkeys, exotic birds, and mudskippers in their natural habitat.

ang-thong-marine-park.title: Ang Thong Marine Park
ang-thong-marine-park.subtitle: 42-Island Archipelago
ang-thong-marine-park.description: Explore a stunning 42-island archipelago with emerald lagoons, hidden caves, and panoramic viewpoints. Kayak, snorkel, and hike in paradise.

koh-tao-snorkel.title: Koh Tao & Nang Yuan
koh-tao-snorkel.subtitle: Snorkel Day Trip
koh-tao-snorkel.description: Visit Thailand's best snorkeling spots at Koh Tao and the iconic Koh Nang Yuan sandbar. See sea turtles, tropical fish, and pristine coral reefs.

samui-island-tour.title: Samui Culture & Nature
samui-island-tour.subtitle: Best of the Island
samui-island-tour.description: Visit the Big Buddha Temple, Grandmother & Grandfather Rocks, Na Muang Waterfall, and Lat Ko Viewpoint. The perfect introduction to Koh Samui.

samui-jeep-safari.title: Samui Jungle Jeep Safari
samui-jeep-safari.subtitle: Off-Road Adventure
samui-jeep-safari.description: Off-road through rubber plantations, hidden viewpoints, and local villages. Visit waterfalls, taste local fruits, and see the real Koh Samui.

full-moon-party.title: Full Moon Party Transfer
full-moon-party.subtitle: Koh Phangan Speedboat
full-moon-party.description: 15-minute speedboat ride to the legendary Full Moon Party at Haad Rin Beach, Koh Phangan. Round-trip transfer so you can party all night.

khao-sok-floating-bungalow.title: Khao Sok Floating Bungalow
khao-sok-floating-bungalow.subtitle: 2 Days in Ancient Jungle
khao-sok-floating-bungalow.description: Overnight in a floating bamboo bungalow on emerald Cheow Lan Lake. Jungle trek, cave exploration, kayaking, and wildlife spotting.

khao-sok-day-trip.title: Khao Sok Lake Day Trip
khao-sok-day-trip.subtitle: Oldest Rainforest on Earth
khao-sok-day-trip.description: Longtail boat tour of Cheow Lan Lake, jungle trekking with expert guides, and swimming in a 160-million-year-old rainforest.

khao-sok-night-safari.title: Night Safari & Wildlife
khao-sok-night-safari.subtitle: Nocturnal Jungle Adventure
khao-sok-night-safari.description: Spot nocturnal wildlife with expert guides in one of the world's oldest rainforests. See gibbons, hornbills, and maybe wild elephants.

khao-lak-bamboo-rafting.title: Bamboo Rafting & Waterfall
khao-lak-bamboo-rafting.subtitle: Khao Lak Jungle Day
khao-lak-bamboo-rafting.description: Bamboo rafting down a scenic river, visit Ton Chong Fa Waterfall, and trek through lush Khao Lak jungle. Traditional Thai lunch included.

similan-liveaboard.title: Similan Liveaboard 3N
similan-liveaboard.subtitle: Ultimate Dive Trip
similan-liveaboard.description: 3-night liveaboard diving expedition to Similan Islands and Richelieu Rock, Thailand's best dive site. Multiple dives daily with top-tier equipment.

koh-lanta-4-islands.title: Koh Lanta 4 Islands
koh-lanta-4-islands.subtitle: Emerald Cave Adventure
koh-lanta-4-islands.description: Visit Koh Mook's famous Emerald Cave (swim through darkness into a hidden beach), snorkel at Koh Kradan, Koh Chuak, and relax on Koh Ngai.

koh-lanta-old-town.title: Koh Lanta Old Town
koh-lanta-old-town.subtitle: Heritage & Culture Walk
koh-lanta-old-town.description: Explore the traditional sea gypsy village with wooden stilt houses over the sea, ancient Chinese shophouses, and incredible local seafood.

private-yacht.title: Private Yacht Charter
private-yacht.subtitle: Luxury Island Hopping
private-yacht.description: Charter your own yacht and create a custom island-hopping itinerary. Visit Phi Phi, Racha, Coral Island, or anywhere you choose.

sunset-dinner-cruise.title: Sunset Dinner Cruise
sunset-dinner-cruise.subtitle: Andaman Sea at Golden Hour
sunset-dinner-cruise.description: Sail into the sunset aboard a luxury catamaran. Enjoy a gourmet buffet dinner, live music, and panoramic views of the Andaman coast.

scuba-diving.title: PADI Discover Scuba
scuba-diving.subtitle: First Dive Experience
scuba-diving.description: No experience needed. Learn to dive with PADI-certified instructors at Racha Island. See tropical fish, coral gardens, and maybe even a turtle.

elephant-sanctuary.title: Elephant Sanctuary
elephant-sanctuary.subtitle: Ethical Elephant Experience
elephant-sanctuary.description: Visit rescued elephants in their natural habitat. Feed, bathe, and walk alongside gentle giants. No riding, 100% ethical.

zipline-adventure.title: Hanuman World Zipline
zipline-adventure.subtitle: Fly Through the Jungle
zipline-adventure.description: Soar through the Phuket rainforest on 32 platforms, including a 400m zipline. The ultimate adrenaline experience in Phuket.

fishing-trip.title: Deep Sea Fishing
fishing-trip.subtitle: Big Game Adventure
fishing-trip.description: Head offshore for a full day of deep sea fishing. Target sailfish, marlin, tuna, and more in the Andaman Sea.

thai-cooking-class.title: Thai Cooking Class
thai-cooking-class.subtitle: Learn Authentic Recipes
thai-cooking-class.description: Visit a local market to pick ingredients, then cook 5-7 Thai dishes with an expert chef. Take home a recipe book and bragging rights.

muay-thai-experience.title: Muay Thai Experience
muay-thai-experience.subtitle: Train Like a Fighter
muay-thai-experience.description: Learn authentic Muay Thai from professional fighters. Private pad work training, technique drills, and a full workout. All fitness levels welcome.

atv-big-buddha.title: ATV Jungle & Big Buddha
atv-big-buddha.subtitle: Off-Road Adventure
atv-big-buddha.description: Drive an ATV through Phuket's jungle trails to Big Buddha viewpoint. Panoramic views of the bay, then visit Wat Chalong temple.

old-town-food-walk.title: Old Town Food & Heritage
old-town-food-walk.subtitle: Phuket Walking Tour
old-town-food-walk.description: Explore Phuket Old Town's Portuguese architecture, street art, and local markets. Taste 8+ dishes at hidden local restaurants the tourists miss.

jet-ski-island-hop.title: Jet Ski Island Hopping
jet-ski-island-hop.subtitle: 6-Island Expedition
jet-ski-island-hop.description: Drive your own jet ski to 6 islands around Phuket. Stop at Khai, Naka, and Rang Yai islands for swimming, snorkeling, and beach time.

parasailing-phuket.title: Parasailing Adventure
parasailing-phuket.subtitle: Fly Over the Andaman Sea
parasailing-phuket.description: Soar above the turquoise waters of Patong Beach with panoramic views of the coastline. Includes banana boat ride for extra fun.

samet-nangshe-sunrise.title: Samet Nangshe Sunrise
samet-nangshe-sunrise.subtitle: Best Viewpoint in Thailand
samet-nangshe-sunrise.description: Wake before dawn for Thailand's most spectacular sunrise. Watch light paint across Phang Nga Bay's 100+ limestone karsts. Combined with James Bond Island visit.
